Sun.positive: Rise in status, government support, name and fame, leadership opportunities
Sun.challenging: Ego conflicts, father's health issues, conflict with authority, heart/eye health
Sun.alert_message: Sun Mahadasha activates your soul's purpose, career, and relationship with authority figures.

market_message.india: Surya Mahadasha — time for Surya upasana, government matters, and establishing your dharma
market_message.usa: Solar period active — your identity, career, and authentic self-expression are in focus
market_message.latam: Período Solar — tu propósito de vida y autoridad personal están siendo activados

Moon.positive: Emotional happiness, property gains, public recognition, good relationships, mental peace
Moon.challenging: Mental stress, mother's health, relationship volatility, insomnia, digestive issues
Moon.alert_message: Moon Mahadasha heightens emotional sensitivity and brings home, family, and inner world into focus.

market_message.india: Chandra Mahadasha — time for Shiva-Parvati upasana, emotional purification, and home matters
market_message.usa: Lunar period — your emotional life, home environment, and inner landscape are the focus
market_message.latam: Período Lunar — tu mundo emocional, hogar y conexión con lo femenino están en primer plano

Mars.positive: Property acquisition, courage, athletic achievement, real estate success, sibling support
Mars.challenging: Accidents, surgeries, conflicts, property disputes, brothers/siblings issues
Mars.alert_message: Mars Mahadasha is a high-energy period. Channel your vitality constructively and take extra care with safety.
Mars.safety_note: Advise extra caution with driving, physical risks, and conflicts

market_message.india: Mangal Mahadasha — Hanuman upasana essential, channel energy wisely, be cautious of accidents
market_message.usa: Mars period — high energy, action-oriented time. Direct your drive constructively or it creates conflict
market_message.latam: Período de Marte — tiempo de acción, valentía y energía — úsala con sabiduría

Mercury.positive: Business success, communication excellence, educational achievements, writing/media opportunities
Mercury.challenging: Miscommunication, business disputes, nervous disorders, skin problems, overthinking
Mercury.alert_message: Mercury Mahadasha is a 17-year period ideal for business, education, and communication. Your mind is your greatest asset.

market_message.india: Budh Mahadasha — 17 years of intellectual and commercial opportunity. Saraswati and Vishnu upasana
market_message.usa: Mercury period — your intellect, communication, and business abilities are highlighted for 17 years
market_message.latam: Período de Mercurio — 17 años de oportunidades intelectuales y comerciales

Jupiter.positive: Marriage, children, wealth expansion, spiritual growth, education, guru's blessings
Jupiter.challenging: Overexpansion, weight gain, liver issues, religious dogma, over-optimism without planning
Jupiter.alert_message: Jupiter Mahadasha is a 16-year blessing period. Expand with wisdom — this is your time for growth.

market_message.india: Guru Mahadasha — Brihaspati's grace is upon you. Time for marriage, children, education, and spiritual growth
market_message.usa: Jupiter period — an expansive 16-year blessing cycle. Growth, wisdom, and abundance are your themes
market_message.latam: Período de Júpiter — 16 años de abundancia, sabiduría y crecimiento espiritual

Venus.positive: Marriage, romance, artistic success, luxury, social recognition, vehicles, creative achievements
Venus.challenging: Overindulgence, relationship complications, kidney issues, overspending, sensory excess
Venus.alert_message: Venus Mahadasha is the longest at 20 years — a full cycle of love, beauty, and refinement.

market_message.india: Shukra Mahadasha — 20 years of Lakshmi's grace. Marriage, luxuries, and Venus significations bloom
market_message.usa: Venus period — your 20-year cycle of love, beauty, creativity, and refined pleasures begins
market_message.latam: Período de Venus — 20 años de amor, belleza, creatividad y abundancia

Saturn.positive: Sustained success through hard work, property, long-term recognition, karmic clearing
Saturn.challenging: Delays, depression, health issues, loss, isolation, bones/joints, chronic illness
Saturn.alert_message: Saturn Mahadasha is a 19-year karmic period. Discipline, patience, and humility are your greatest tools.
Saturn.safety_note: Monitor for depression or chronic health issues — recommend professional support if needed

market_message.india: Shani Mahadasha — 19 years of karmic reckoning. Shani upasana, discipline, seva are essential
market_message.usa: Saturn period — a 19-year restructuring cycle. What you build with integrity now will last a lifetime
market_message.latam: Período de Saturno — 19 años de aprendizaje kármico, disciplina y construcción sólida

Rahu.positive: Rapid material rise, foreign success, technological achievement, unconventional recognition
Rahu.challenging: Confusion, deception, obsession, health illusions, relationship illusions
Rahu.alert_message: Rahu Mahadasha is an 18-year period of ambition and illusion. Truth-seeking and grounding are essential anchors.

market_message.india: Rahu Mahadasha — Durga upasana essential. Avoid maya, seek truth amid Rahu's illusions
market_message.usa: Rahu period — an ambitious 18-year cycle. Technology, foreign connections, and unconventional paths are highlighted
market_message.latam: Período de Rahu — 18 años de ambición y transformación. Mantente centrado en la verdad

Ketu.positive: Spiritual breakthrough, liberation path, psychic development, release of karma
Ketu.challenging: Confusion, sudden losses, accidents, health issues, detachment from life
Ketu.alert_message: Ketu Mahadasha is a 7-year spiritual period. The outer world recedes — your inner world awakens.

market_message.india: Ketu Mahadasha — Ganesha and Bhairav upasana. Spiritual sadhana and detachment are key
market_message.usa: Ketu period — a 7-year spiritual awakening cycle. Release what no longer serves your soul's growth
market_message.latam: Período de Ketu — 7 años de despertar espiritual y liberación kármica

confluence_rules.message: Double Saturn activation — one of life's most intense karmic periods. Extraordinary patience and spiritual practice required. This period builds your most enduring foundations.
remedies: Blue Sapphire ONLY after thorough chart analysis

confluence_rules.message: Peak Jupiter blessing — double Jupiter activation. This may be the most auspicious period of your life. Act boldly toward your highest aspirations.
Maximum Rahu-Moon activation — peak confusion and illusion period. Ground yourself in truth, avoid major decisions, and prioritize mental clarity practices.
Profound spiritual uprooting. External world may feel meaningless. This is not emptiness — it is preparation for spiritual rebirth.
Strong marriage and relationship indicators. If unmarried, this is a prime period for finding a life partner.

within_saturn_md.Saturn_Saturn: Deepest karmic period. Maximum Saturn intensity. 2-3 years of pure discipline and karmic reckoning.
within_saturn_md.Saturn_Mercury: Mental clarity returns. Business and communication improve. Mind becomes sharper.
within_saturn_md.Saturn_Ketu: Spiritual acceleration within a difficult period. Sudden insights and losses.
within_saturn_md.Saturn_Venus: Some relief and pleasure. Relationship matters and comforts improve briefly.
within_saturn_md.Saturn_Sun: Authority conflicts and father matters come up. Identity under pressure.
within_saturn_md.Saturn_Moon: Emotional heaviness and mental challenges. Sade Sati-like effect even without transit.

within_jupiter_md.Jupiter_Jupiter: Peak blessings. Maximum expansion. Marriage, children, wealth most likely now.
within_jupiter_md.Jupiter_Saturn: Slowdown after expansion. Consolidate gains made earlier.
within_jupiter_md.Jupiter_Mercury: Intellectual and business expansion. Study, writing, communication flourish.
within_jupiter_md.Jupiter_Venus: Love and marriage highly likely. Artistic and creative success.
within_jupiter_md.Jupiter_Sun: Recognition and career advancement. Father's wellbeing good.
